entities.name: Operator
entities.context: A system that auto-detects signals and behaviors.

entities.name: signal
entities.context: An indication that can be ambiguous and requires interpretation.

entities.name: specific mode
entities.context: A desired operational state that may override automatic detection.

entities.name: Testing mode behavior
entities.context: A mode for evaluating the system's behavior.

relationships.context: Operator can switch to a specific mode regardless of the signal.
Operator relates to testing mode behavior when evaluating signals.
